title: Current trust gate prefers a less relevant higher-trust fact
description: Pins today’s Risk C behavior: the multiplicative trust gate can bury a more relevant low-trust fact even when it matches the full query.
contract_notes: This is an intentional baseline for M1. It documents the current shipped behavior so future fusion tuning (M2) can flip the expectation deliberately.

facts.content: Database backup runbook uses pg_dump nightly
Acme primary database runs on Postgres
